message:
Add discovery parser fixture corpus and tests (caam-3ezz.6)

Tailscale fixtures:
- basic_online.json: Simple 2-peer online status
- mixed_online_offline.json: 4 peers with 2 online, 2 offline
- schema_drift_v2.json: Future v2 format with extra fields (ExitNode, Tags, etc.)
- minimal.json: Bare minimum required fields
- ipv6_only.json: IPv6-only peers (no IPv4)
- not_running.json: Stopped backend state
- no_peers.json: Self online but no peers

WezTerm fixtures:
- basic.lua: Standard 2-domain config with identity files
- multiple_domains.lua: 5 domains with mixed multiplexing
- tailscale_ips.lua: Domains using Tailscale 100.x.x.x addresses
- minimal.lua: Single domain with required fields only
- no_ssh_domains.lua: Config without ssh_domains block

Tests verify:
- Schema drift tolerance (unknown fields ignored)
- Optional field parsing (UserID, ExitNode, LastSeen)
- IPv4/IPv6 address handling
- Backend state detection
- Identity file path expansion (wezterm.home_dir, ~/)
- Multiplexing filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+-- Basic WezTerm config with ssh_domains
+local wezterm = require 'wezterm'
+local config = {}
+
+config.font = wezterm.font 'JetBrains Mono'
+config.font_size = 14.0
+
+config.ssh_domains = {
+  {
+    name = 'csd',
+    remote_address = '192.168.1.100',
+    username = 'ubuntu',
+    multiplexing = 'WezTerm',
+    ssh_option = {
+      identityfile = wezterm.home_dir .. '/.ssh/csd.pem',
+    },
+  },
+  {
+    name = 'css',
+    remote_address = '192.168.1.101',
+    username = 'admin',
+    multiplexing = 'WezTerm',
+    ssh_option = {
+      identityfile = wezterm.home_dir .. '/.ssh/css.pem',
+    },
+  },
+}
+
+return config

@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+-- WezTerm config with many ssh_domains
+local wezterm = require 'wezterm'
+local config = {}
+
+config.ssh_domains = {
+  {
+    name = 'prod-server-1',
+    remote_address = '10.0.1.1',
+    username = 'deploy',
+    multiplexing = 'WezTerm',
+    ssh_option = {
+      identityfile = '/home/user/.ssh/prod.pem',
+    },
+  },
+  {
+    name = 'prod-server-2',
+    remote_address = '10.0.1.2',
+    username = 'deploy',
+    multiplexing = 'None',
+    ssh_option = {
+      identityfile = '/home/user/.ssh/prod.pem',
+    },
+  },
+  {
+    name = 'dev',
+    remote_address = '192.168.50.10',
+    username = 'developer',
+    multiplexing = 'WezTerm',
+    ssh_option = {
+      identityfile = '~/.ssh/dev_key',
+    },
+  },
+  {
+    name = 'staging',
+    remote_address = 'staging.example.com',
+    username = 'staging',
+    multiplexing = 'WezTerm',
+    ssh_option = {
+      identityfile = wezterm.home_dir .. '/.ssh/staging.pem',
+    },
+  },
+  {
+    name = 'localhost-test',
+    remote_address = '127.0.0.1',
+    username = 'testuser',
+    multiplexing = 'None',
+  },
+}
+
+return config

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+-- WezTerm config without ssh_domains
+local wezterm = require 'wezterm'
+local config = {}
+
+config.font = wezterm.font 'Fira Code'
+config.font_size = 12.0
+config.color_scheme = 'Dracula'
+
+return config
